rules.found: return turnType='reply', message='Confirm delete?' -> dispatcher enters WAITING_CONFIRM
rules.confirm: User says 'yes'/'confirm' -> execute delete -> return turnType='complete'
rules.deny: User says 'no'/'never mind' -> return turnType='complete', message='Ok, not deleted'
rules.notFound: return turnType='complete', message='No matching record found'

sections.offTaskDetection: User input deviates from delete task -> return turnType='off-task'.
